member.name: M:Pukar.Usermanagement.API.Extensions.UserManagementApiExtensions.AddPukarUserManagementApi(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Registers user management (EF, auth, refresh tokens) and JWT bearer validation. Call after AddControllers() or use on the MVC builder.

member.name: M:Pukar.Usermanagement.API.Extensions.UserManagementApiExtensions.AddPukarUserManagementControllers(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IMvcBuilder)
member.summary: Registers controllers from this assembly (required when the host references this project as a library).
